props.ChoiceText: A ring of keys changed your life more thoroughly than a blade or title might have, because every locked store became a measure of trust.
props.ChoiceBio: Keys and cellars taught you that household power is carried in metal and silence.

0.TargetText: A cook, porter, or cellarer now treats you as someone who once held the house together by access.
0.TransitionText: Because keys and cellars taught you that household power is carried in metal and silence, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.
